Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment

MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Denis Klavdianos, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, VIASMERICAS MONEY SERVICES CORPORATION, A CORPORATION,
Court granted Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up,
No appearance by defaulted defendant BRADLEY M. ROXAS AKA BRADLEY MAGPOC ROXAS, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA PHILUSA ENTERPRISE,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $47,819.41
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,731.60
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $513.90
Total Judgment in the amount of $54,889.91

Judgment signed in open court.
